purpose: Ensure the target quantity is explicit
pass_condition: ATE ATT CATE ITE LATE or uplift is named
All features are pre-treatment or explicitly justified
No severe lack of support in policy-relevant region
Used for R DR DML-style learners or justified if absent
Effect signs and key rankings are not learner-specific
Placebo effect near null or explicitly explained
No strong effect on outcome that should not respond
Out-of-sample uplift improves over random targeting
Conclusion states how much hidden bias would matter

purpose: Prevent treating CATE ranking as welfare
pass_condition: Cost benefit or constraint rule is stated
